content:
No More I love you's
Written by D.Freeman & J.Hughes
Performed by Annie Lennox

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
Do bi do bi do do do  oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
Do bi do bi do do do  oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
Do bi do bi do do do  oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
I used to be lunatic from the gracious days[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
I used to be woe-be-gone and so restless nights[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
My aching heart would bleed for you to see[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]F7sus4[/ch]
Oh but now_______________________[/tab]
                (I don't find myself bouncing home, whistling button-hole tunes to make me cry)

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]
No more "I love you's"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbsus4[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
A language is leaving me[/tab]

No more "I love you's"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbsus4[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]                [ch]Eb[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]/[ch]Eb[/ch]
Changes are shifting outside the words_________________[/tab]
                                                (The lover speaks about the monsters)
[Verse 2]
I used to have demons in my room at night
Desire, despair, desire, so many monsters

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]F7sus4[/ch]

                (I don't find myself bouncing home, whistling button-hole tunes to make me cry)
